features.name: ternary operator with x value in false branch
features.description: Code should include a ternary operator (? :) where the false branch uses an undefined value (8'bx or 8'bz), causing different x-propagation behavior between simulation and synthesis

features.name: blocking assignment timing in testbench
features.description: Code should include a testbench that updates clock and data signals at the same simulation time step using blocking assignments, causing undefined behavior in stratified event queue
